source.pattern: Any modifying agent must work only in explicitly assigned files

consumers.pattern: exact file-scoped delegation
every step's `Files:` list must contain absolute or repo-relative paths

Do not silently expand scope

source.pattern: Run every declared command. There is no duration cap
